{"graphInstanceObjectId":"0f799719-76f5-4e1b-a08d-05c0324762ac","graphInstanceFolderObjectId":"403ac573-7599-48cb-ac00-cddcaad06fa9","queries":[{"displayName":"Query","id":"929cbf38-601a-46eb-801c-2d648ef4f3d6","queryMode":"GQLCode","gqlQueryText":"MATCH
         (root:CLIENT)-[:CONNECTED_TO]->{1,3}(peer:CLIENT),
         (peer)-[:EXECUTES]->(tr:TRADE),
         (tr)-[:REFERENCES]->(ins:INSTRUMENT)
        -- (ins)-[:HAS_EVENT]->(ev:EVENT)
     
     FILTER
         tr.daysToNextEvent <= 2
     
     LET
         root_client = root.id,
         connected_client = peer.id,
         underlying = ins.id,
         exposure = tr.notional1,
         min_event_gap = tr.daysToNextEvent
     
     RETURN
         root_client,
         underlying,
         COUNT(DISTINCT connected_client) AS connected_clients,
         SUM(exposure) AS total_exposure,
         MIN(min_event_gap) AS min_days_to_event
     GROUP BY
         root_client,
         underlying
     --HAVING
     --    SUM(exposure) > 500000000
      --  AND COUNT(DISTINCT connected_client) >= 2
     ORDER BY
         total_exposure DESC
     LIMIT 100
","nodes":[],"edges":[]},{"displayName":"Query 2","id":"bcd02100-1f59-4e99-b20e-95a6d55736c3","queryMode":"VisualDiagram","nodes":[{"alias":"3cca1c71-5833-4225-a6e5-88701668b87a","posX":1013,"posY":366,"format":{"color":"#15C6F4"},"filters":[{"propertyName":"id","operator":"starts with","value":"SWP"}]}],"edges":[]},{"displayName":"Query 3","id":"b6f9cddb-4f4b-420c-af3c-45f39b6877c6","queryMode":"GQLCode","gqlQueryText":"MATCH
         (root:CLIENT)-[:CONNECTED_TO]->{1,3}(peer:CLIENT),
         (peer)-[:EXECUTES]->(tr:TRADE),
         (tr)-[:REFERENCES]->(ins:INSTRUMENT)
        -- (ins)-[:HAS_EVENT]->(ev:EVENT)
     LET
         root_client = root.id,
         connected_client = peer.id,
         exposure = tr.notional1,
         underlying = ins.id    

     RETURN
         root_client,
         connected_client,
         exposure,
         underlying

       ","nodes":[],"edges":[]}]}
